title: Ouch My Eyes
description: Turns down the brightness on snow, making it less blinding
body:
![An image showing how the resource pack darkens the colour of snow in order to make it less blinding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f50a9d0fe4fcae29731092f16ea2d1258e1476b9.webp)

### A simple resource pack that makes snow less blinding.
**NOTE: This pack works for any version, even if the pack shows up as red.**

I may post different versions in the versions tab just to get rid of the "this resource pack is made for an older/newer version" error, but any version works!

The resource pack uses the vanilla Jappa texture for the snow. If you're using Programmer Art it might look a bit odd.
